skill.name: vision
skill.description: Analyze screenshots, diagrams, UI mockups, error images, and other visual content with concise observations.
skill.summary: Interpret visual content and report visible details, text, uncertainty, and suspicious issues.
skill.author: 0xSero

security_audit.summary: The two static weak-cryptography findings are false positives in natural-language prose at SKILL.md:3 and SKILL.md:22. No code, scripts, network calls, filesystem access, external commands, secret access, or prompt injection attempts were found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Prose
low_findings.description: The static finding at SKILL.md:3 points to a description sentence about visual analysis. No cryptographic algorithm, library call, or security-sensitive configuration is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line contains only frontmatter prose for the skill description. There is no executable code or cryptographic context.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Pattern in Vision Guidance
low_findings.description: The static finding at SKILL.md:22 points to an instruction to describe visible elements. No weak cryptographic algorithm or unsafe security operation is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line is plain instruction text for image analysis. It does not invoke crypto, code execution, data access, or external services.

content.value_statement: Visual details can be hard to turn into clear written findings. This skill helps Claude, Codex, and Claude Code inspect images and report concise observations.
actual_capabilities: Analyzes screenshots, diagrams, UI mockups, and error images.
Describes visible UI elements, text, layout, code, and diagrams.
Extracts legible text while preserving useful formatting.
Notes uncertainty when image details are unclear.
Highlights broken, inconsistent, or suspicious visual details.
limitations: It depends on the host model and tool support for image input.
It cannot recover text that is unreadable in the supplied image.
It does not perform automated image editing or generation.
It does not verify facts that are only implied by an image.

use_cases.title: Review Product Screenshots
use_cases.description: Identify visible layout issues, missing labels, confusing states, and inconsistent UI details.

use_cases.title: Analyze Error Screenshots
use_cases.description: Extract visible errors, stack traces, file names, and interface context for faster debugging.

use_cases.title: Interpret Technical Diagrams
use_cases.description: Summarize visible architecture components, flows, labels, and uncertain relationships.

prompt_templates.title: Describe This Image
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this image. Describe the visible elements, important text, and anything unclear.

prompt_templates.title: Extract Screenshot Text
prompt_templates.prompt: Extract all legible text from this screenshot. Preserve line breaks when they help interpretation.

prompt_templates.title: Review UI State
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this UI screenshot. List visible controls, layout issues, confusing states, and suspicious inconsistencies.

prompt_templates.title: Interpret Diagram Evidence
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this technical diagram. Summarize components, relationships, labels, assumptions, and low-confidence readings.

output_examples.input: A screenshot of a login page with an error banner.
output_examples.output: The page shows email and password fields, a disabled sign-in button, and an error banner. The banner says the session expired.

output_examples.input: A cloud architecture diagram with several labeled services.
output: The diagram shows a client, API gateway, application service, database, and monitoring service.
Arrows suggest requests flow from the client to the gateway, then to the application service.
The database label is partly unclear, so that reading should be verified.

best_practices: Ask for uncertainty notes when accuracy matters.
Tell the skill whether you need text extraction, layout review, or diagram interpretation.
anti_patterns: Do not rely on it to read blurred or cropped text perfectly.
Do not treat inferred visual relationships as confirmed facts.
Do not use it as a replacement for accessibility testing tools.

faq.question: What image types does this skill handle?
faq.answer: It is designed for screenshots, UI mockups, diagrams, error images, and other visual content.

faq.question: Can it extract text from screenshots?
faq.answer: Yes. It can extract legible text and preserve useful formatting when visible.

faq.question: Does it support Claude, Codex, and Claude Code?
faq.answer: Yes. The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.

faq.question: Can it analyze architecture diagrams?
faq.answer: Yes. It can summarize visible components, labels, flows, and uncertain relationships.

faq.question: Does it send data to external services?
faq.answer: No evidence found. The skill file contains instructions only and no network code.

faq.question: Is this skill safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes. The weak-cryptography alerts were false positives in prose, and no dangerous behavior was found.
